data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — Gap Classification Step in Phase 7 at line ~1349, contract at gap-classification-output.md, tests at test_sprint_gap_classification.py. The routing line says 'Proceed with the existing Phase 7 remediation flow (Step 1 below)' but the contract's routing description says 'implementation-plan' suggesting invocation of the skill. Need to clarify in SKILL.md that ROUTING: implementation-plan means bug-task creation via Phase 7 Step 1, not invocation of /dso:implementation-plan skill. Test file needs a new test asserting the corrected routing.
